case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. STEPHANIE PIERINI et al

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-09-2011 CONTINUED TO APR-13-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE FEB-09-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIERINI, STEPHANIE $17,988.99 PRINCIPAL, $2,888.10 INTEREST, $408.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,285.09, SEE SCANNED DOC
